observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with forming defect
Visual pattern suggesting thread damage on top
Localized deviation from normal screw appearance
mechanism_explanation: Metal forming process error creates irregularities in the thread profile.
severity_visual_description: critical thread damage on top visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Replace thread rolling dies and adjust forming speed.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the thread damage on top would be absent and surface appears normal.
